_about: PROTECTED default VTOL model — snapshot of gokce_flight16 (the active VTOL when the Models system was added). The Models menu refuses to edit or delete it; duplicate it to make an editable model.
_backend_doc: ue_physics = ArduPilot runs --model JSON and gets physics from UE's UVTOLPhysicsComponent using the mass/inertia/aero values below. Use this for simulating real vehicles with measured data. ap_native = ArduPilot's built-in QuadPlane model; ignores mechanical/electrical fields.

_doc.mass_kg: Total vehicle mass in kg — with full batteries, no payload. Used for F=ma and hover thrust calibration.
_doc.inertia_roll_kg_m2: Moment of inertia around the roll axis (X, wing-to-wing), in kg·m². Larger = slower roll response.
_doc.inertia_pitch_kg_m2: Moment of inertia around the pitch axis (Y, nose-to-tail), in kg·m². Larger = slower pitch response.
_doc.inertia_yaw_kg_m2: Moment of inertia around the yaw axis (Z, vertical), in kg·m². Usually the largest of the three for a VTOL with wide wingspan.
_doc.arm_length_m: Distance from the vehicle centre to each lift motor, in metres. For a quad: half the motor-to-motor diagonal.
_doc.collision_radius_m: Bounding-sphere radius used for inter-vehicle collision momentum exchange, metres.
_doc.cg_offset_x_m: Centre-of-gravity offset from the geometric centre along body X (forward positive), metres. STORED for the future CG-shift model — not yet consumed by the physics.
_doc.cg_offset_y_m: CG offset along body Y (right positive), metres. Stored for future use.
_doc.cg_offset_z_m: CG offset along body Z (down positive), metres. Stored for future use.
_doc.wingspan_m: Wing tip-to-tip span in metres. Documentation/derivation value (AR = span²/area); the aero model uses wing_area_m2 + aspect_ratio.
_doc.wing_area_m2: Total wing reference area in m². Used in all aerodynamic force calculations: L = 0.5 * rho * V^2 * S * CL.
_doc.aspect_ratio: Wing aspect ratio: span^2 / wing_area. Higher AR = more efficient wing (less induced drag).
_doc.oswald_e: Oswald efficiency factor (0–1). 0.8 is typical for a clean UAV wing.
_doc.mac_m: Mean Aerodynamic Chord in metres — effective average chord length used in pitch moment calculations.
_doc.cl0: Lift coefficient at zero angle of attack. Positive for cambered airfoils.
_doc.cl_alpha: Lift curve slope in 1/radian (dCL/dAlpha). Finite-wing value ≈ 2*pi / (1 + 2/AR).
_doc.cd0: Zero-lift (parasite) drag coefficient — EFFECTIVE value, calibrated 2026-07-02 so closed-loop AUTO cruise settles at the real ~24 m/s. Also absorbs pusher-prop thrust decay with airspeed.
_doc.cy_beta: Side-force derivative dCY/dBeta in 1/radian. Negative for a stable aircraft.
_doc.cm_aileron: Roll moment coefficient per radian of aileron deflection.
_doc.cm_elevator: Pitch moment coefficient per radian of elevator deflection. Negative = trailing-edge-down elevator → nose-up moment.
_doc.cm_rudder: Yaw moment coefficient per radian of rudder deflection.
_doc.cm_alpha: Static pitch stiffness dCm/dAlpha in 1/radian. MUST be negative (statically stable) — without it the autopilot pitch loop diverges.
_doc.cm_q: Pitch rate damping dCm/dq̂ per radian. Negative. Typical: -8 to -25.
_doc.cl_p: Roll rate damping dCl/dp̂ per radian. Negative. Typical: -0.4 to -0.6.
_doc.cn_r: Yaw rate damping dCn/dr̂ per radian. Negative. Typical: -0.1 to -0.2.
_doc.cn_beta: Weathervane stability dCn/dBeta in 1/radian. Positive = nose turns into the relative wind.
_doc.stall_aoa_deg: Angle of attack at which the wing stalls, in degrees.
_doc.min_airspeed_ms: Airspeed below which all aerodynamic forces are suppressed (m/s) — hover regime.
_doc.max_control_deflection_deg: Maximum control surface deflection angle in degrees (aileron, elevator, rudder).
_doc.air_density: Air density in kg/m³. 1.225 at sea level, 15°C.
